hero.title: Premium uPVC Doors & Windows Solutions
hero.subtitle: Durable • Energy Efficient • Weather Resistant • Custom Made

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyUs.subtitle: We deliver premium quality uPVC profiles engineered for longevity and style.
whyUs.materialsDesc: High-grade UV-resistant uPVC profiles that do not fade, warp, or corrode over time.
whyUs.installationDesc: Certified expert installers ensuring perfect alignment, sealing, and operation.
whyUs.weatherDesc: Engineered to withstand heavy rains, strong winds, and extreme summer temperatures.
whyUs.soundDesc: Multi-chambered profiles with double glazing that cut outside noise by up to 40dB.
whyUs.energyDesc: Low thermal conductivity profiles that keep your interiors cool and reduce AC energy bills.
whyUs.pricingDesc: Direct factory-to-home pricing with no middlemen markups, delivering maximum value.

products.title: Our Featured Products
products.subtitle: Explore our wide range of custom-designed uPVC doors and windows.
products.slidingWindowsDesc: Space-saving and smooth-gliding windows ideal for modern balconies and patios.
products.casementWindowsDesc: Traditional swing-out windows offering maximum ventilation and airtight sealing.
products.fixedWindowsDesc: Non-opening windows designed for maximum light intake and scenic panoramic views.
products.tiltTurnWindowsDesc: Versatile European design opening inwards for ventilation or swinging fully open.
products.bayWindowsDesc: Elegant projection windows creating an illusion of space and adding character to rooms.
products.slidingDoorsDesc: Smooth multi-track sliding doors that seamlessly blend indoor and outdoor spaces.
products.frenchDoorsDesc: Classic double door designs adding elegance and security to porches and balconies.
products.casementDoorsDesc: Single leaf swing doors providing high security and weather seals for main entries.
products.balconyDoorsDesc: Optimized swing or sliding entry systems built to block dust and monsoon rain.
products.entranceDoorsDesc: Premium heavy-duty designer doors featuring multi-point locks and woodgrain finishes.

calculator.title: Smart Quotation Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Enter your dimensions below to receive an instant estimated cost.
calculator.disclaimer: Final quotation may vary after site inspection and exact measurements.
calculator.successMessage: Thank you! Your quotation request has been submitted. Our team will contact you shortly to schedule a free site measurement.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end uPVC door and window engineering and installation services.
services.mfgDesc: State-of-the-art automated manufacturing to guarantee precise cuts, welding, and structural integrity.
services.instDesc: On-site installation using heavy-duty anchor bolts and premium polyurethane foam sealants.
services.measDesc: Free site visit by qualified technicians using laser measures to ensure zero errors in production.
services.repairDesc: Expert tuning of sliding rollers, replacement of worn-out rubber gaskets, and hardware repair.
services.replDesc: Seamless dismantling of old wooden or aluminum frames and replacement with modern uPVC profiles.
services.commDesc: Scalable window and door engineering solutions for offices, high-rises, apartments, and villas.

process.title: Our Process Workflow
process.step1Desc: Reach out via Phone, WhatsApp, or request a quote online.
process.step2Desc: Our technician visits your property at your convenient time.
process.step3Desc: Laser-guided millimeter accurate measurement of all openings.
process.step4Desc: Receive a detailed itemized quote with various customization choices.
process.step5Desc: Precision welding and assembly of your products in our factory.
process.step6Desc: Fast, clean, and professional installation completed in hours.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us for inquiries, site measurements, or orders.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you shortly.

common.comparisonDesc: Drag the slider to see the difference between old timber windows and our modern uPVC double-glazed solutions.
